hypothesis: Frozen v4.10 monolithic ExECT S0/S1 label policy on the full fixed validation split (40 records) with Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite establishes hosted-model comparison evidence against GPT and Qwen anchors under exect_gemini_ladder_replay_v1.
metric_caveats: This is the full fixed ExECTv2 validation split (40 records), not published ExECTv2 benchmark reproduction.
Benchmark-facing fields are limited to audited diagnosis, seizure type, and annotated medication.
GPT 4.1-mini frozen dev anchor: runs/exect_s0_s1_validation_full_gpt4_1_mini_20260519T221944Z (92.3% micro F1).
Do not compare this run to GPT full validation as the same experiment; same scorer, different model track.
Do not treat Round-2 full_exect_gemini_combined_examples as a comparable anchor without stale-architecture caveat.
Record token usage, latency, and billing when inspecting artifacts.
Evidence quote support should be reported both overall and split between exact model quotes and ellipsis bridge repairs.
